name: Get AWS Inspector Findings
description: Retrieves AWS Inspector v2 findings for a specific AWS account and writes results to JSON

inputParameters.name: AwsAccountId
inputParameters.label: AWS Account ID
inputParameters.description: The AWS account ID to filter Inspector findings (12 digits)

inputParameters.name: FindingStatus
inputParameters.label: Finding Status
inputParameters.description: Finding status filter for findings (ACTIVE, SUPPRESSED, CLOSED, or ALL for no status filter)

outputParameters.name: FindingsCount
outputParameters.label: Findings Count
outputParameters.description: The number of findings returned by the query

outputParameters.name: FindingsFile
outputParameters.label: Findings File
outputParameters.description: The output file name containing Inspector findings
